ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Code for the team (e.g., MIL, ATL, PHI) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Home arena of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the team */,
  "dbl_dbl" INTEGER /* Number of double-doubles */,
  "tpl_dbl" INTEGER /* Number of triple-doubles */,
  "forty_pts" INTEGER /* Number of 40-point games */,
  "twenty_reb" INTEGER /* Number of 20-rebound games */,
  "twenty_ast" INTEGER /* Number of 20-assist games */,
  "five_stl" INTEGER /* Number of 5-steal games */,
  "five_blk" INTEGER /* Number of 5-block games */,
  "pts_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored by the team per game */,
  "reb_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds by the team per game */,
  "ast_per_game" REAL /* Average assists by the team per game */,
  "stl_per_game" REAL /* Average steals by the team per game */,
  "blk_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks by the team per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the result belongs to */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "high_game" INTEGER /* High game score */,
  "mov" REAL /* Margin of victory */,
  "techs" INTEGER /* Number of technical fouls */,
  "hob" REAL /* Hollinger Offensive and Defensive (HOB) rating */,
  "ast_to" REAL /* Assist-to-turnover ratio */,
  "stl_to" REAL /* Steal-to-turnover ratio */,
  "ft_fga" REAL /* Free throw-to-field goal attempt ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "win_loss_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the record belongs to */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season for which the win-loss record is recorded */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home wins */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of home losses */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away wins */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of away losses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_win_loss_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team owner, coach, analyst, fan) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the team data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the team data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the team data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
